clause_text: Annual leave shall be fifteen (15) calendar days per year.
risk_reason: Saudi Labor Law mandates a minimum of 21 days annual leave after one year of service; 15 days violates a non-waivable statutory right.
saudi_legal_note: المادة 109 من نظام العمل تُوجب إجازة لا تقل عن 21 يومًا بعد سنة خدمة — هذا حق آمر لا يجوز التنازل عنه.
recommended_revision: Revise to a minimum of twenty-one (21) calendar days per year as required by Saudi Labor Law Art. 109.
related_regulation: Saudi Labor Law (Royal Decree M/51 1426H) Art. 109

clause_text: The probationary period shall not exceed nine (9) months from the date of joining.
risk_reason: Saudi Labor Law caps the probationary period at 180 days; a 9-month clause exceeds the statutory limit and is void to that extent.
saudi_legal_note: المادة 53 من نظام العمل تحدد الحد الأقصى لفترة التجربة بـ 180 يومًا — اشتراط 9 أشهر مخالف للنظام ويعدّ باطلًا.
recommended_revision: Revise to: 'The probationary period shall not exceed one hundred and eighty (180) days from the date of joining.'
related_regulation: Saudi Labor Law (Royal Decree M/51 1426H) Art. 53

clause_text: The employer may terminate this contract at any time without cause and without payment of end-of-service award.
risk_reason: Waiving end-of-service benefit (EOSB) is prohibited under Saudi Labor Law; unilateral termination without cause also exposes the employer to compensation claims.
saudi_legal_note: المادة 84 من نظام العمل تُوجب مكافأة نهاية الخدمة — وهي حق آمر لا يجوز إسقاطه. الإنهاء التعسفي يُعرّض صاحب العمل للتعويض وفق المادة 80.
recommended_revision: Remove the EOSB waiver entirely. Specify lawful termination grounds per Art. 80 and confirm EOSB entitlement per Art. 84.
related_regulation: Saudi Labor Law (Royal Decree M/51 1426H) Arts. 80 & 84

clause_text: This contract shall be governed by the laws of England and Wales.
risk_reason: Saudi labor courts have exclusive mandatory jurisdiction over employment disputes; a foreign governing law clause is unenforceable and misleads the employee regarding their rights.
saudi_legal_note: المحاكم العمالية السعودية ذات اختصاص آمر في منازعات العمل — الاتفاق على قانون أجنبي لعقد عمل منفَّذ في المملكة مخالف للمادة 8 من نظام العمل.
recommended_revision: Replace with: 'This contract shall be governed by Saudi Labor Law and applicable regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.'
related_regulation: Saudi Labor Law (Royal Decree M/51 1426H) Art. 8

clause_text: Performance reviews shall be conducted periodically based on internal company criteria.
risk_reason: No defined review schedule or objective criteria; vague terms may create ambiguity around compensation adjustments and promotion rights.
saudi_legal_note: غياب معايير موضوعية محددة للتقييم قد يُفضي لنزاع حول الترقية أو تعديل الأجر أمام المحاكم العمالية.
recommended_revision: Add: semi-annual review schedule; specific measurable criteria; explicit link to salary adjustment or promotion where applicable.
